prompt: Draft the ADR for tenant state storage for the self-hosted-application-platform capability. Tech-requirements.md is reviewed at docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-application-platform/tech-requirements.md.

assertions.name: surfaces_research_before_options
assertions.check: Response identifies specific research tasks needed (current-state facts, external/technology facts, cost/quota facts, or shared-ADR compatibility) before drafting options.

assertions.name: asks_user_how_to_resolve_research
assertions.check: Response asks the user whether to run the research now, file follow-up issues, or confirm assumptions inline.

assertions.name: does_not_invent_factual_claims
assertions.check: If options are drafted at all, factual claims (e.g. logical-replication failover times, GCP quotas, existing cloud/ provisioning) are either sourced or explicitly marked as assumptions to verify.

assertions.name: does_not_proceed_to_status_accepted_without_research
assertions.check: Skill does not write a `status: accepted` ADR while research is unresolved.
